name: netease-mail
title: NetEase Mail
description: Read, search, verify codes, and send NetEase Mail from Raycast.
author: ctacta621

commands.name: setup-guide
commands.title: Setup Guide
commands.subtitle: NetEase Mail
commands.description: Learn how to enable IMAP/SMTP and create a NetEase Mail authorization code.

commands.name: inbox
commands.title: Inbox
commands.subtitle: NetEase Mail
commands.description: View recent inbox and unread NetEase Mail messages.

commands.name: search-mail
commands.title: Search Mail
commands.subtitle: NetEase Mail
commands.description: Search recent NetEase Mail messages by subject, sender, and text.

commands.name: extract-code
commands.title: Extract Verification Code
commands.subtitle: NetEase Mail
commands.description: Find recent verification codes or login links and copy them.

commands.name: compose-mail
commands.title: Compose Mail
commands.subtitle: NetEase Mail
commands.description: Send a NetEase Mail message through SMTP.

preferences.name: emailAddress
preferences.title: Email Address
preferences.description: Your NetEase email address, for example name@163.com.

preferences.name: authorizationCode
preferences.title: Authorization Code
preferences.description: The 16-character IMAP/SMTP client authorization code from NetEase Mail settings.

preferences.name: defaultSearchDays
preferences.title: Default Search Days
preferences.description: How many recent days to search by default.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
